settings.heading: Calmer crate time starts with a better chew routine.
settings.subheading: Use supervised yak chew sessions to build positive calm-time associations before crate, rest, or downtime.
settings.problem_heading: Crate time can feel stressful without the right routine.
settings.problem_text: Dogs need calm transitions, familiar rewards, and safe supervised practice before downtime feels natural.
settings.solution_heading: A chew can become a positive calm cue.
settings.solution_text: Prime Pet Food yak chews support a repeatable enrichment ritual that helps dogs settle into quieter moments.
settings.review_1: This became part of our calm-down routine.
settings.review_2: A great supervised reward after training.
settings.review_3: Helped redirect anxious energy into chewing.
settings.product_text: Use a correctly sized yak chew during supervised practice to support calmer transitions.
settings.bullet_4: Best with fresh water and supervision
settings.final_text: Start a calmer chew routine today.
